title: Container Item
description: The container item type. The only structurally-special type: it groups child instances and arranges them on a grid. Children are validated by the dashboard instance schema; the container-only-children rule is enforced by the resolver (E1-S4). Grid fields are intentionally minimal here and will be formalized (relative-weight tracks + placement) in E2-S1.

grid.title: Container Grid
grid.description: Minimal grid stub describing how children are laid out. E2-S1 formalizes relative-weight tracks and placement; treat these fields as provisional.

direction.description: Primary flow direction of the grid.

columns.description: Provisional column count. Superseded by relative-weight tracks in E2-S1.

rows.description: Provisional row count. Superseded by relative-weight tracks in E2-S1.
